mapper.sql: id, account_id, amount, date, note, type, is_reinvested, transaction_id, is_deleted, created_at, updated_at
mapper.update: UPDATE investment_income SET account_id = #{accountId}, amount = #{amount}, date = #{date}, note = #{note}, type = #{type}, is_reinvested = #{isReinvested}, transaction_id = #{transactionId}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT FROM investment_income WHERE account_id = #{accountId} AND is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY date DESC
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(amount), 0) FROM investment_income WHERE account_id = #{accountId} AND is_deleted = 0
